name: Noonas Over Flowers
overview: Singer/Actor/MC Lee Seung Gi accompanies four of Korea's top actresses—Yoon Yeo-Jung, Kim Ja-Ok, Kim Hee-Ae and Lee Mi-Yeon—on a trip to Croatia, a country with a strong exotic feel, beautiful natural scenery, and diverse cultural heritage.

trailers.title: Noona Over Flowers (꽃보다 누나) - Teaser Trailer 1
